inferred.summary: Join us for Boulder Bash 9, our annual Fall bouldering competition, from November 9th to November 14th. The competition kicks off with a Redpoint Round on November 9th, and the top 10 competitors will compete in the Onsight Finals on November 14th. Registration is $25 for members and $50 for non-members, with free entry for spectators.

metadata.raw_description: We’re stoked to announce that our annual Fall bouldering competition, Boulder Bash 9, will be held the week of Sunday, November 9th. We’ll kick off a week-long Redpoint Round Sunday, November 9th with donuts and coffee. You’ll have until closing time on Thursday, November 13th to climb your heart out on a host of fresh comp-style boulders. Points are awarded for sends, with the most points awarded for flashes and fewer points for subsequent attempts. The top 10 competitors will be invited to participate in an Onsight Finals round the evening of Friday, November 14th.

inferred.summary: The USAC Youth + Collegiate Qualifying Event will take place on Saturday, November 8th. This event is part of the competitive climbing calendar and will require participants to register in advance.

metadata.raw_description: In addition to Boulder Bash, we have a few other events coming in November that we want you to be aware of: USAC Youth + Collegiate QE: Saturday, November 8th.

inferred.summary: The California Climbing Team Onsight Series will be held on Sunday, November 9th from 7am to 11am. This event is designed for competitive climbers and will feature various climbing challenges.

metadata.raw_description: In addition to Boulder Bash, we have a few other events coming in November that we want you to be aware of: California Climbing Team Onsight Series Sunday, November 9th 7am-11am.

inferred.summary: The NorCal Youth Climbing League event is scheduled for Saturday, November 22nd. This competition is aimed at youth climbers and will require prior registration.

metadata.raw_description: In addition to Boulder Bash, we have a few other events coming in November that we want you to be aware of: NorCal Youth Climbing League: Saturday, November 22nd.
